answers.question: Token budget
answers.answer: Default 30K tokens per group. Configurable via RestructureCodebaseAgentConfig. Not in config.toml — passed at construction time.

answers.question: set_grouping schema
answers.answer: Each group: { id: String, paths: Vec<String>, estimated_tokens: u32, description: String }. The id is kebab-case, paths are relative to repo root.

answers.question: Manifest scope
answers.answer: Support all three: pyproject.toml (tool.uv.workspace.members), package.json (workspaces), Cargo.toml (workspace.members). These cover Python, JS/TS, Rust monorepos.

answers.question: Drill-down termination
answers.answer: Stop when all groups fit within budget. Max depth 5 as safety limit. No minimum granularity — agent decides.

answers.question: Dependency availability
answers.answer: #950 and #951 are already implemented. Groups artifact schema defined by this agent — downstream agents accept Vec<CodebaseGroup>.

answers.question: CLI entry point
answers.answer: No CLI. Only invoked programmatically by orchestrator. Exposed via PyO3 for Conductor.
